zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anne Pakenham於大約1486年出生在英國肯特書爾斯特時，她的父親Sir Hugh Pakenham28歲，母親Anne Clement28歲。她於1500年與William Sydney of Penshurst在英國英格蘭肯特書爾斯特結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1544年10月22日在英國英格蘭肯特書爾斯特享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特書爾斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Anne Pakenham于大约1486年出生在英国肯特書爾斯特时，她的父亲Sir Hugh Pakenham28岁，母亲Anne Clement28岁。她于1500年与William Sydney of Penshurst在英国英格兰肯特書爾斯特结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1544年10月22日在英国英格兰肯特書爾斯特享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特書爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Pakenham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Pakenham (Suffolk). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Pacca (genitive Paccan) + hām ‘village, homestead’.
History: A family of this name has been established in Westmeath, Ireland, since the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anne Pakenham was born about 1486, in Penshurst, Kent, England, her father, Sir Hugh Pakenham, was 28 and her mother, Anne Clement, was 28. She married William Sydney of Penshurst in 1500, in Penshurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died on 22 October 1544, in Penshurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Penshurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anne Pakenham est née environ 1486, à Penshurst, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh Pakenham, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Anne Clement, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé William Sydney of Penshurst en 1500, à Penshurst, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 octobre 1544, à Penshurst, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Penshurst, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Anne Pakenham um 1486 in Penshurst, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Hugh Pakenham 28 und ihre Mutter Anne Clement 28. Sie hat 1500 in Penshurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom William Sydney of Penshurst geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. Oktober 1544 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Penshurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Penshurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Pakenham è nata il circa 1486 nel Penshurst, Kent, England, sua padre, Sir Hugh Pakenham, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Anne Clement, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato William Sydney of Penshurst nel 1500, nel Penshurst, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 22 ottobre 1544, nel Penshurst, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Penshurst, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Pakenhamが約1486年にイギリスケントペンシュルストで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Pakenhamは28歳，母Anne Clementは28歳であった。1500年にイギリスイギリスケントペンシュルストでWilliam Sydney of Penshurstと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1544年10月22日にイギリスイギリスケントペンシュルストで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントペンシュルストにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Pakenham(이)가 대략 1486년 영국 켄트 펜슈르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh Pakenham(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Clement(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 펜슈르스트에서 William Sydney of Penshurst(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1544년 10월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 펜슈르스트에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 펜슈르스트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Pakenham nasceu aproximadamente 1486, em Penshurst, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh Pakenham, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Anne Clement, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com William Sydney of Penshurst em 1500, em Penshurst, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de outubro de 1544, em Penshurst, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Penshurst, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anne Pakenham родилась около 1486 г. в местности пеншурст, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Hugh Pakenham было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Clement, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Sydney of Penshurst в 1500 г. в местности пеншурст, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла 22 октября 1544 г. в местности пеншурст, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности пеншурст, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Anne Pakenham nació aproximadamente 1486, en Penshurst, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Hugh Pakenham, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Anne Clement, tenía 28 años. Se casó con William Sydney of Penshurst en 1500, en Penshurst, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de octubre de 1544, en Penshurst, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Penshurst, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
